# 11 — Inference Learning: Updating `D` Across Episodes

Coming soon. This tutorial runs the `AgentRuntime` Active Inference loop
over the A / B / C / D matrices produced by COGANT's reverse pipeline for
five episodes, then plots the variational free-energy trajectory alongside
the evolving `D` prior to illustrate multi-episode inference learning.

> **Background:** The A / B / C / D matrices and the perception-action loop
> are defined in [Active Inference for Programmers](../concepts/active_inference.md)
> and [What is a GNN?](../concepts/gnn.md). The reverse pipeline that
> synthesises the model used here is documented in
> [api/reverse.md](../api/reverse.md), and the runtime surface is in
> [api/runtime.md](../api/runtime.md).

See [related docs](../index.md) for now.
